summary: Policy network (tactic predictor) fully implemented: MLP baseline (PolicyNetwork, 699K params, 25-dim features), ProofStepDataset with frame-class mask-aware collation, PolicyTrainer with masked cross-entropy and AdamW, synthetic data generator covering all valid action indices, CLI training/evaluation scripts, formula AST tokenizer and transformer encoder (PolicyNetworkV2, ~1.3M params). End-to-end training achieves 79.4% top-1 accuracy on 5K synthetic steps.
